name: 7 up Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add flour to the mixture.
4. Beat in the lemon extract and 7-Up.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Cool for 10 minutes on a wire rack before removing from the pan.
